title: Access Control
description: Restrict who can respond to this form

requireSignIn.title: Require sign-in to respond
requireSignIn.description: Respondents must sign in with Google or a one-time email code before they can fill out this form

allowedDomains.title: Restrict to email domains
allowedDomains.description: Only respondents with a verified email on one of these domains can respond
allowedDomains.label: Allowed domains

validation.invalidDomainMessage: "{{domain}}" doesn't look like a valid domain (e.g. "example.com")

collectEmail.title: Collect respondent email addresses
collectEmail.description: Ask respondents to sign in with Google or a one-time email code so you can see who submitted each response — without restricting who can respond
collectEmail.impliedByRequireSignIn: Already collected because sign-in is required above
